response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scene detection: Skit intro (00:00-00:15), Comic narration (00:16-03:34), Performance (03:35-05:01). 2. Metadata: Found "Sympathy" by Eve in the video credits and confirmed with search. 3. Search: Used queries 'Eve Sympathy lyrics' and 'Eve 共感 lyrics'. Found full lyrics on Vocaloid Lyrics Wiki. 4. Data formatting: Compiled scenes, metadata, and lyrics into JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features an animated introductory skit and a comic-style narrative scene, followed by a musical performance of the song "Sympathy" by Eve, performed by the VTubers Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, and Kureiji Ollie.

scenes.description: Animated sequence with character dialogue, serving as an introduction to the video.
A sequence of comic-style panels depicting the story's narrative, with character dialogue.
The performers sing the song "Sympathy" on a virtual stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, Kureiji Ollie

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I think back, and in my memories,
I was crying.
Carrying uncertain dreams and loneliness,
I was smiling.
That pain and those wounds, and those innocent eyes tooー
All seem like they'll all be for naught.
Impatience and uneasiness blur together,
and I'm going to be swallowed up by my tears.
But there is a never a time when even a single one of us is missing, and though we were separate,
Our feelings become music and connect.
The days that we strummed out
so we wouldn't forget about them echoed throughout,
And we know that the "us" of back then weren’t mistaken.
We're looking for a flash of light that has been shut away.
Let me hear your voice; shout out for me that "I'm right here!"
And don't let go of my hand.
It’s as if I'm the only one
Left behind in this world,
And in the midst of that darkness, I come to a halt, and end up letting go.
Then maybe it would be easier to just live on by myself.
The thrill of being captivated by our dreams and ideals
Is pulling ourselves closer towards it,
So we'll answer its call.
Our music echoes throughout;
We're not done quite yet!
We're going into overtime, and it won't end until this music cuts out.
Oh hero, the one we fantasized about when we were children,
Your entrance is awaiting you!
The days that we strummed out
so we wouldn't forget about them echoed throughout,
And we know that the "us" of back then weren’t mistaken.
We're looking for a flash of light that has been shut away.
Let me hear your voice; shout out for me that "I'm right here!"
And don't let go of my hand.
